extension.summary: Autoplay videos from a folder on Kodi startup
Automatické přehrávání videí ze složky po startu Kodi
extension.description: On Kodi startup, the add-on loads videos from a selected folder and starts an endless playback loop.
Po startu Kodi, doplněk načte videa ze zvolené složky a spustí nekonečnou smyčku přehrávání.
extension.news:
v1.0.6 - Fixed a Python syntax error in service.py. - Added a user dialog and opened settings when the configured video folder is missing or contains no supported videos. - Fixed addon metadata for repository validation. - Replaced icon with a solid-background version.
v1.0.5 - Add configurable folder selection and optional startup overlay text. - Various metadata and settings-format fixes for official repo submission.
